```yaml
oai_tool_fixture:
  oai_id: OAI-TOOL-001
  trigger: tool_ceiling_high_confidence
  current_tool_stack_id: fixture:current@1
  current_tool_slug: fixture-tool
  prior_ad_binding: AD-001
  ad_binding: AD-002
  alternatives: [fixture-alt, fixture-alt-two]
  alternative_stack_ids:
    fixture-alt: fixture:alt@1
    fixture-alt-two: fixture:alt-two@1
  recommended_default: a
  decision: chose_a
```
